home.name: Asilbek
home.title: Full-Stack Developer
home.description: Full-Stack Developer specializing in scalable web platforms and Telegram bot solutions. Delivered projects serving 70,000+ users across education, tourism, and fintech sectors, including a payment integration system processing $10,000+ in monthly transactions. Proficient in JavaScript, PHP, Python, and Django, with a strong focus on performance, security, and clean architecture.
